mano_cua.result_summary: Betaflight Configurator是飞控硬件配置器，需要连接飞控设备才能显示完整标签栏和Expert Mode选项。浏览器中仅显示Welcome/断开连接页面，5个基础标签可见但无法找到Expert Mode开关。53步超时停止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Betaflight Configurator requires hardware connection to display full tab bar and Expert Mode toggle. Browser shows only Welcome/disconnected state with 5 basic tabs. Expert Mode checkbox not found in disconnected state. Stopped at 53 steps after 15min timeout.
